arts.ttl: Racic, Diakite, Frabotta, Cole - Tony Mowbray's instruction to West Brom's fringe players - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Mowbray, who is already looking forward to next week when he'll have a full week on the training pitch without the distraction of a midweek fixture, is slowly doing his homework and keeping a keen eye on those on the fringes of the starting XI as things stand so that, when he needs to change things from the bench, he knows what he has at his disposal. Albion went abroad in the summer and filled their quota of overseas players who they were eligible to sign through the relevant criteria, but Mowbray wouldn't be as well versed in the qualities and performance levels of the likes of Ousmane Diakite, Uros Racic and Gianluca Frabotta.

West Brom had no response to Hayden Hackney's 29th-minute opener on Tuesday night as the Baggies were beaten 2-0 by play-off chasing rivals Middlesbrough. Tony Mowbray's men have failed to win any o...

arts.ttl: From Switzerland: Club give their stance on transfer to Leeds United, Norwich City or West Brom
arts.sum: Willem Geubbels has been the subject of links to a number of Championship clubs in recent days, with Leeds United, Norwich City and West Bromwich Albion all presented as options for the January window. The 23-year-old currently plays for FC St. Gallen in Switzerland and he’s made 23 appearances so far this season.
